goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should 'arrive by 16:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should go to norwich
The train should arrive by 16:15 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get price and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee
